title: lantana aculeata var. subinermis
intro: Lantana aculeata var. subinermis, also known as the prickly lantana, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Verbena family, characterized by its thorny stems and clusters of small flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, headaches, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lantana aculeata var. subinermis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
